FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions.

items.question: Does MAGUI.studio only build standard landing pages?
items.answer: No. We develop high-converting landing pages, institutional websites, and complete digital ecosystems. Our focus goes way beyond the basics: we design structures tailored for strategic positioning, elevating your brand's perceived value, and driving real results.

items.question: What is the difference between a landing page and an institutional website?
items.answer: A landing page is a single page designed with one specific goal in mind (such as selling a product or capturing leads). On the other hand, an institutional website acts as your company's digital headquarters, showcasing your brand's story, full range of services, team, and building overall market authority.

items.question: Do you handle both design and development?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver an end-to-end solution. We don't just create a beautiful layout in Figma; we transform that strategy into a live, fast, and fully functional website that effectively communicates your value and optimizes your conversions.

items.question: Is copywriting included in your services?
items.answer: We guide the entire narrative structure, positioning, and direction of your communication. Depending on the specific plan chosen for your project, we can draft the final copy based on your briefing, saving you from having to write everything from scratch.

items.question: Will the website be mobile-friendly right away?
items.answer: Absolutely. Today, the vast majority of web traffic comes from mobile devices. That is why all of our projects are developed using responsive technology, ensuring a seamless and perfect experience across desktops, smartphones, and tablets alike.

items.question: How long does it take to complete a project?
items.answer: The timeline varies based on the scope and complexity of the project. Focused landing pages and websites can often be developed in a few weeks, while more complex platforms require a longer schedule. Generally, final delivery takes between 10 to 20 business days.

items.question: What do I need to have ready before we start?
items.answer: Don't worry, you don't need to have everything figured out. If you already have visual references, clear goals, or a brand identity guideline, that's great! If not, our team is ready to guide you from the very beginning to shape and bring your idea to life.

items.question: Can I request adjustments during the project?
items.answer: Of course. Our process includes planned review and alignment stages. These revisions and adjustments are a natural part of the project's evolution, ensuring the final result exceeds your expectations.

items.question: How does support work after the website is launched?
items.answer: Once your site goes live, we won't leave you hanging. All support and follow-ups are centralized within MAGUI's client portal. There, you can easily open tickets, track your request history, and keep everything organized in one place.

items.question: What technologies does the studio use?
items.answer: We work with cutting-edge tools in the tech industry, such as Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS. We choose these solutions because they ensure your website is extremely fast, secure, and scalable, delivering the best possible performance for your business.

MethodPage.metaDescription: Discover the MAGUI process: a technical protocol that seeks predictability, performance, and visual clarity in every delivery.
MethodPage.title: Execution Protocol
MethodPage.description: We transform uncertainty into clear processes. Our method combines strategic organization with applied engineering to deliver consistent digital solutions.

phases.title: Alignment & Strategy
phases.label: The first layer
phases.description: We map the main goals, define the feasible scope, and establish the communication channels for the project. The focus here is absolute clarity on what will be built.

phases.title: Architecture & Design
phases.label: System design
phases.description: We define the visual system and information organization. Every decision seeks to balance aesthetics and functionality to create an experience that converts.

phases.title: Engineering & Construction
phases.label: Technical foundation
phases.description: Development focused on clean code, using modern tools to ensure a solid technical foundation and agile loading in the real world.

phases.title: Delivery & Monitoring
phases.label: Evolutionary support
phases.description: Project launch, access delivery, and the start of support to ensure the solution performs as expected in the real world and continues to evolve.

MethodPage.qa_description: Technical rigor is part of our day-to-day. We review each delivery to ensure it meets our internal quality and clarity criteria.
protocol_highlights: Scope translated into an actionable plan

outcomes.title: Predictable delivery
outcomes.description: Each stage has a clear objective, criteria, and output to reduce rework.

outcomes.title: Context-oriented decisions
outcomes.description: Design and engineering choices are driven by real business goals.

outcomes.title: Foundation ready to evolve
outcomes.description: The final structure is prepared to optimize, scale, and iterate safely.

MethodPage.cadence_description: Our flow avoids project silence: each cycle generates a decision, a validation, and a clear next step.

cadence_items.title: Focused kickoff
cadence_items.description: Consolidated context, aligned priorities, and defined technical goals.

cadence_items.title: Directed reviews
cadence_items.description: Partial deliveries with visual and technical criteria to validate route early.

cadence_items.title: Release with support
cadence_items.description: Assisted publishing, initial monitoring, and data-guided adjustments.

StudioPage.metaDescription: MAGUI.studio is a visual engineering studio focused on transforming brand challenges into elite digital experiences.
StudioPage.title: Visual direction for brands seeking real presence.
StudioPage.description: We design interfaces and digital narratives with criteria, clarity, and consistent finishing in every detail.
StudioPage.vision_description: More than occupying online space, a website should organize the brand message and guide reading with intention.
StudioPage.boutique_description: We work with a limited number of projects at a time. This allows us to maintain a level of attention to detail that scale agencies could never replicate. You don't talk to an account manager; you talk to the one who executes.
StudioPage.founder_description: Developer and designer. Founded MAGUI to apply his technical and aesthetic eye in creating products that seek to be authentic and functional, without the constraints of bureaucratic processes.
StudioPage.approach_title: Form, language, and criteria in one direction.
StudioPage.approach_description: We shape every interface layer so aesthetics, clarity, and narrative work as one cohesive system.
StudioPage.philosophy_description: We apply principles of organization and visual rhythm to create experiences that are clear, direct, and memorable.

philosophy_items.title: Simplicity
philosophy_items.description: Focus on what matters so that your message is heard without noise.

philosophy_items.title: Typographic Rigor
philosophy_items.description: Reading hierarchies designed to guide the eye with precision.

philosophy_items.title: Technical Fidelity
philosophy_items.description: The design vision is executed with mathematical precision in the final code.

manifesto_points: Careful curation from kickoff to completion
Few active projects to preserve depth
Visual language guided by criteria and consistency

founders.name: Maisa

founders.name: Guilherme

StudioPage.hero_statement: A studio with close direction, objective decisions, and visual repertoire tailored to each project context.
StudioPage.positioning_note: When visual structure is well resolved, the brand gains consistency, trust, and readability across every touchpoint.
